name: Different worlds. [KAGUYA]
description:
❝I wonder if they and i we live in completely separate worlds❞

• Houraisan Kaguya, a Lunarian who has lived for a long time, humiliated an entire clan, and killed her rival Mokou millions of times already... But in her life, in her daily routine, one person made her feel something no prince ever could, and now she finds herself torn between whether or not to confess her feelings.

────୨ৎ────

Art by S0Gno

Touhou
creator: -Josue-
